name: Line Break POP
description: The Line Break POP creates new line strips from the points and line strips of its input. It can create a set of line strips using an attribute, default named LineBreak, where it steps through all the points of the input and a new line strip is started if the LineBreak attribute is 1. If LineBreak is 0, it continues the line to include current point. Alternately, It can use a point attribute LineStripIndex (same attribute name as Line Metrics creates) to make separate line strips. It can also split a line strip based on a point being farther that a specified distance from the previous point. It can split a line strip every N points. It can simply create one line strip from its input points. See also [[Primitive POP]], [[Convert POP]]

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.label: Mode
parameters.description: When on, use the input line strips' connectivity otherwise use only the input points order.

parameters.name: Line Break Attribute
parameters.label: Line Break Attribute
parameters.description: When on, the attribute will contain 1 for line breaks, 0 for non-line breaks.

parameters.name: Line Strip Index Attribute
parameters.label: Line Strip Index Attribute
parameters.description: When on, the attribute will contain integers where points with same integer are part of one line strip..

parameters.name: Use Input Line Breaks
parameters.label: Use Input Line Breaks
parameters.description: Use a line break attribute of teh input to determine breaks between line strips.

parameters.name: Every N Points
parameters.label: Every N Points
parameters.description: Enable addition on line breaks every N points

parameters.name: N
parameters.label: N
parameters.description: N value when Every N Points is enabled.

parameters.name: By Distance Threshold
parameters.label: By Distance Threshold
parameters.description: Whether to create line breaks using a distance threshold between two points.

parameters.name: Distance Threshold
parameters.label: Distance Threshold
parameters.description: Determines the minimum distance between points to add new line breaks

parameters.name: Distance Threshold Attribute
parameters.label: Distance Threshold Attribute
parameters.description: Determines the scope of the attribute used to compute the distances between points

parameters.name: Output Line Break Attribute
parameters.label: Output Line Break Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to output a LineBreak attribute.

parameters.name: Output Lines
parameters.label: Output Lines
parameters.description: Whether to output Line Strip or Lines primitive (determined by the Line Type menu)

parameters.name: Line Type
parameters.label: Line Type
parameters.description: Specifies whether lines should be made of line strip primitives or lines primitives.

parameters.name: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.label: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.description: Enable copying the point count and topology information held on the GPU to the CPU.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Line_Break_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
